text:
Hi Join  hiring team,

I'm applying for the Full stack Staff Engineer role.

Senior/Staff-level recent work: Lockheed Martin Sr SWE (.Net 4.8 + AngularJS proposal management) and Oculearn CTO/Tech Lead 24 yrs.

What drew me to Join : the role description (staff-eng, senior) maps to work I've shipped recently and architecture decisions I've owned end-to-end.

I'm based in Castle Hayne NC; remote works well for me, and I'm open to fully remote.

Resume + a few of the OSS projects mentioned above attached / linked. Happy to walk through any of the work in a call.

Kevin Luddy
Castle Hayne, NC
github.com/kevin-luddy39

prompt: Job listing open. Click the APPLY button on the page → company portal opens. Cover letter is in clipboard (Ctrl+V where needed). Don't forget to attach resume. Auto-pause 15s, you don't need to do anything here.
